title: Working holiday visas :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Working holiday visas
Learn if you can come to New Zealand for a holiday and work while you are here. Find out what level of English you will need to get a working holiday visa.
- Who can apply for a working holiday visa Working holiday visas allow young people from recognised countries to work and travel in New Zealand, normally for up to 12 months.

## Who can apply for a working holiday visa
Working holiday visas allow young people from recognised countries to work and travel in New Zealand, normally for up to 12 months.
- Working holiday visa medical requirements If you apply for a working holiday visa you may need to have a chest X-ray or medical examination to prove you are in good health.

## Working holiday visa medical requirements
If you apply for a working holiday visa you may need to have a chest X-ray or medical examination to prove you are in good health.
- English language skills for working holiday visas For some working holiday visas, you will need proof of your English language skills. Check what you will need for the visa you are applying for.

## English language skills for working holiday visas
For some working holiday visas, you will need proof of your English language skills. Check what you will need for the visa you are applying for.
- Finding short-term work when on a working holiday If you have a working holiday visa, you can work in short-term, seasonal jobs, in a variety of industries, while travelling around New Zealand.

## Finding short-term work when on a working holiday
If you have a working holiday visa, you can work in short-term, seasonal jobs, in a variety of industries, while travelling around New Zealand.
- Register for information Register interest in living and working in New Zealand.

## Register for information
Register interest in living and working in New Zealand.
